lines.text: ...Baa. Oh. A traveller. Haven't seen one of those in a while.

choices.text: Have you seen anything strange around here?

lines.text: Me? I'm Wolliver. Former royal advisor. Current sheep.
It's a long story involving a wizard, a misunderstanding about property taxes, and one very unfortunate Tuesday.
I'd rather not get into the details. What else do you want to know?

choices.text: Have you seen anything strange around here?

lines.text: The Ashfield. Used to be a farming village before the lava came up through the ground.
Everyone left. I stayed. Someone has to remember it.
...Also my legs aren't what they used to be. Anything else?

choices.text: Have you seen anything strange around here?

lines.text: Strange. Hm. Define strange. This whole field is on top of a lava shelf.
But if you mean recently... yes. There's something moving in the eastern ruins at night.
I don't sleep much anyway. Hard to, when the ground glows.
Be careful if you go east. Whatever it is, it doesn't sound friendly.

choices.text: I'll keep that in mind. Goodbye.

lines.text: Safe travels, traveller. The field has a way of keeping people longer than they intended.
